texto: Remembering and ForgettingYou have not forgotten to remember
autor: You have remembered to forget.But people can forget to forget. That is just as important as remembering to remember – and generally more practical.

That is just as important as remembering to remember – and generally more practical. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Remembering and ForgettingYou have not forgotten to remember” articula reflexao, idries-shah, reflections em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflections.
